calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Vs. Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Vs. Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff Citibank N.A.'s unopposed Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Good cause appearing, consistent with the terms of the settlement and the record before the court, the court will enter judgment providing Plaintiff CITIBANK, N.A., shall have and recover from
Defendant Carlos Nino the principal sum of $3,025.00 plus court costs in the sum of $575.00 for a total judgment of $3,600.00. The court intends to enter judgment consistent with the proposed judgment submitted by Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's request to "vacate dismissal" is denied because no dismissal has been filed to date.

Defendant is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by 8:30 am on 10/23/2025.

A proposed order and proposed judgment are submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-18-2025 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 19, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff.The court denies continuing the OSC hearing and order the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

***After Hearing and further review, the court vacates its ruling dismissing the case without prejudice. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 15, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610.***
